questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. Raju is <u>lazy</u> and smart, but he does not attend the classes.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the given sentence. Even if an unlaced shoe is spotless, it is not <u>neat</u>.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the word provided in the brackets to fill in the blank. The painting exhibited a __________________ blend of colours. (harmonious)
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the given sentence. He was very <u>inquisitive</u> and wanted to know each and every detail.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the given sentence. Anupama was a very <u>industrious</u> child and submitted all her assignments on time.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Elevation
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM for the underlined word. My teacher is very <u>diligent</u>.
Select the word that is opposite in meaning (ANTONYM) to the highlighted word in the given sentence. We enjoyed the gentle breeze that was blowing.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Presumably
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Disposed

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM for the underlined word in the given sentence. Such specifications have revived our designers and manufacturers, whereas this new arrangement will <u>free</u> them.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the given sentence. The mellow tune of the flute soothes me.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Sloppy
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Callous
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the bracketed word in the sentence given below. Surrounded by lush greenery, the house stood _____________ (submissively) atop a hill.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Tranquil
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Chaotic
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Captivity
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. They reinvested in their trades and indulged in <u>unobtrusive</u> ̲consumption at home.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. Amit, the stand-up comedian, delivered a <u>hilarious</u> performance.

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. High-altitude climbing poses ̲<u>significant</u> ̲ risks due to factors like altitude sickness, hypothermia and extreme weather conditions.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined segment in the given sentence. It's important to bring up <u>sensitive</u> ̲topics in a respectful manner.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Harmony

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the given sentence. Overfishing and destructive fishing practices threaten the ̲<u>sustainability</u> ̲ of marine resources and ecosystems.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the highlighted word in the given sentence. The negotiations were conducted in an amicable atmosphere, leading to a peaceful resolution.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the given sentence. A few students have <u>condemned</u> the latest project of preparing teaching aids as a waste of money.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Curse
Identify the most appropriate ANTONYM of the word in brackets. The magician's performance was (captivating) and held the audience spellbound.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. she had <u>garnered</u> the information from various books.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Frugal
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Ambrosial
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM for the given word. Merciful
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Evasive

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the word 'yelling' in the given sentence. The shouting and exclaiming gestures of Smita led to the whispering regarding her behaviour, and everyone in the party started monitoring her.
Identify the most appropriate ANTONYM of the word in brackets. The teacher commended the student for his (diligent) efforts.

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the word given in brackets to fill in the blank. The ________(sarcastic) comments by her husband made her feel uncomfortable, and she decided to walk out of the relationship.
Identify the ANTONYM of the word in brackets. The athlete's (languid) performance disappointed the fans as well as coaches.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the given sentence. Abhay's <u>humility</u> towards the poor and needy people of his locality is really admirable.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Ally
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM for the underlined word in the given sentence. He is a <u>lazy</u> person.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. The family members described their dream home's architectural <u>elegance</u>.
Identify the most appropriate ANTONYM of the word in brackets. Her candid remarks were a (refreshing) change from the usual diplomatic responses.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Piquant
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the highlighted word. Sonali uses a <u>soft</u> mattress to sleep.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM that can substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. She asked if he could recount a moment when he felt completely <u>serene</u>.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Show

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word in the given sentence. The late secretary of our society was known for his <u>ruthless</u> treatment of all the security personnel of the society.
Select the most appropriate word opposite in meaning (ANTONYM) to the underlined word in the given sentence. Aunty Hema gave us her <u>candid</u> opinion on the skit we performed on Children’s Day.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Fetid
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Obsequious
